title: Short title
doc_html:
SUBPART B-2. CANCER PATIENT'S RIGHT

TO PROMPT COVERAGE ACT

§1060.11. Short title

            This Subpart shall be known and may be cited as the "Cancer Patient's Right to Prompt Coverage Act".

            Acts 2023, No. 254, §1.
